---
title: "Consulting & Advising"
---

# Consulting & Advising

I support projects at the intersection of ecology, environmental change, public health, and spatial decision-making.

My work is most useful for teams that need to turn complex environmental or biological data into maps, models, evidence summaries, field strategies, or decision-support products.

## Areas where I can help

- Spatial modeling and ecological suitability mapping
- Species distribution models and habitat suitability analysis
- Environmental health and One Health evidence synthesis
- Uncertainty analysis and survey prioritization
- Field study design and ecological monitoring
- Invasive species, freshwater systems, restoration, and environmental change
- Translating technical analyses into reports, maps, presentations, and decision-relevant products

## Useful for

- Public health and environmental health teams
- Conservation, forestry, and watershed programs
- NGOs and implementation partners
- Academic research groups
- Environmental consulting teams
- Local, regional, or international agencies

## Contact

For consulting, advising, or collaboration inquiries, contact me at mitchellrkaitlyn@gmail.com.
